arts.ttl: Serie A | Cagliari v Parma: Match Preview
arts.sum: Cagliari and Parma are set to face off in a high-stakes encounter at the Unipol Domus on Sunday. With both teams teetering on the brink of the relegation zone, separated by just a single point, this match could prove pivotal in determining their top-flight futures. The post Serie A | Cagliari v Parma: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.
